## Change

Describe the profile, source manifest, adapter, or governance change.

## Evidence

- [ ] Every external source is pinned and provenance is recorded.
- [ ] AI-drafted mappings remain `agent-proposed`.
- [ ] No normative PIC contract was copied or modified here.
- [ ] `sh ci/check.sh` passes.
- [ ] Loss, uncertainty, effective-date, and jurisdiction limits are explicit.

## Ownership boundary

State which repository remains authoritative for each input and output.
